title: Domapine Fiends - Confetti on Completed Task Animation to go Full Screen
excerpt: Such a small little feature, but the confetti gives me and my colleagues a little hit of dopamine when marking a task as completed, but then the dread hits as the rest of the To Do list shifts up. Any chance the Complete…

posts.author: Luke_Archer (Luke Archer)
posts.cookedHtml: Such a small little feature, but the confetti gives me and my colleagues a little hit of dopamine when marking a task as completed, but then the dread hits as the rest of the To Do list shifts up. Any chance the Completed confetti animation could go full screen? Think it would give more motivation to keep plowing through! Thanks
